reports.title: Top Five Robot Trends 2026
reports.summary: Robots that use artificial intelligence to work independently are becoming more common. Main benefit of AI in this context is the increased autonomy of robots empowered by AI. Different types of AI drive this trend: Analytical AI helps to process...

reports.title: Pioneering Robot “OTTO” Wins the 2025 IERA Award
